story.text:
## Step 4 — Compress into proverbs and poems

> *A proverb is a spell that has not yet put on its symbols.*

From your narrative, distil the chapbook seeds into `your-folder/proverbs.md`, using
[[Template — Proverb]]. A privacymage proverb is **short**, **dual or triune**
(blade ⊥ spell; or Swordsman · Mage · First Person), **promise-shaped**, and **true
without the canon**. Aim for **5–9** — enough for a chapbook. Where one wants to open
into a short **poem**, let it.

→ **Gate G3** — the facilitator chronicles the proverbs and poems each mouse surfaced.

---

———
↑ up: [[The Workshop]]  ·  ← prev: [[Step 3 — Write Your 31 Acts]]  ·  next: [[Step 5 — Spells and Your Patch]] →

See also: [[Template — Proverb]]
